42.reason: [Only handles '\n' escape sequence, but the input string contains '\a' and '\t' which are not recognized, causing the program to incorrectly report an error or fail to parse the string correctly]

35.reason: If this fails (e.g., file cannot be created), os remains null, causing NullPointerException later when writeOutput is called.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  If this fails (e.g., file cannot be created), os remains null, causing NullPointerException later when writeOutput is called.

210.reason: // This condition fails to detect closing "*/" because after the initial curPos++ (which moves past the first '*'), the current char may be '/', not '*', as in "*/". The loop will not match, causing infinite scanning or incorrect behavior.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  // This condition fails to detect closing "*/" because after the initial curPos++ (which moves past the first '*'), the current char may be '/', not '*', as in "*/". The loop will not match, causing infinite scanning or incorrect behavior.

164.reason: The string escape handling is incomplete; it only supports \n, causing errors on valid escapes like \a or \t, which leads to premature exit and subsequent infinite loops on unhandled characters.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The string escape handling is incomplete; it only supports \n, causing errors on valid escapes like \a or \t, which leads to premature exit and subsequent infinite loops on unhandled characters.

289.reason: The cursor position (token.curPos) is not incremented here. If an unknown character is encountered, the main loop in getAllTokens() will call getSym() again on the same position, causing an infinite loop and Time Limit Exceeded.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The default case does not increment token.curPos, causing an infinite loop when encountering any character not explicitly handled by the switch cases (e.g., leftover characters from failed string parsing or invalid symbols).
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The cursor position (token.curPos) is not incremented here. If an unknown character is encountered, the main loop in getAllTokens() will call getSym() again on the same position, causing an infinite loop and Time Limit Exceeded.

168.reason: [Only handles escape sequence '\n'; other valid escapes like \t, \a, \\, \", etc., are treated as errors, causing incorrect lexical analysis for valid strings like "hello\a world\t"]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Only handles escape sequence '\n'; other valid escapes like \t, \a, \\, \", etc., are treated as errors, causing incorrect lexical analysis for valid strings like "hello\a world\t"]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Only handles escape sequence '\n'; other valid escapes like \t, \a, \\, \", etc., are treated as errors, causing incorrect lexical analysis for strings containing them]
